_comment: GK-05/U67 canonical record of the podcast GHL golden snapshot. This is the repo-side half of the BINARY acceptance ('the v2 snapshot exists with its id recorded in trevorotts1/openclaw-onboarding'). Read/written by scripts/confirm-podcast-snapshot.py -- never hand-edit the snapshot_id fields; use --record-snapshot so the file stays schema-valid.

v2.note: Per GK-05 spec Deps: cut AFTER GK-01/U63 (publish-path fix) lands, so the golden snapshot bakes in the fix rather than the known image_url=null bug. U63 is operator-gated/deferred as of this build (2 of 3 legs blocked, branch skill6-v2/U63) -- see LEDGER U63. Do not cut v2, and do not flip 'current' to v2, until U63 clears. Once Trevor cuts the snapshot live in GHL (Settings -> Snapshots -- no public create API exists for this, per PODCAST-SNAPSHOT-BUILD-MANIFEST.md Section I Phase 5), record the id with: scripts/confirm-podcast-snapshot.py --record-snapshot v2 <snapshot_id>.
